title: P1-4: Recommendation-first web UI (Creators + Gợi ý primary nav)
summary: Replaced seller-OS bottom nav with Home/Creators/Gợi ý/Juli; removed redirects on /creators and /recommendations; added MatchDecisionCard + PredictedOutcomePanel; rewired home.ts to recommendations API with hero matches; analytics on CTA tap.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AC1: /creators and /recommendations reachable from nav without redirect
AC2: Recommendations feed renders match score, predicted block, CTA for host_product_match
AC3: Empty state shows Đang thu thập dữ liệu
AC4: Home hero shows top 1–3 matches from recommendations API
AC5: Nav + CTA tap fires analytics event
